<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ if (\PHP_VERSION_ID < 80400) { #[Attribute(Attribute::TARGET_METHOD | Attribute::TARGET_FUNCTION | Attribute::TARGET_CLASS_CONSTANT)] final class Deprecated { public readonly ?string $message; public readonly ?string $since; public function __construct(?string $message = null, ?string $since = null) { $this->message = $message; $this->since = $since; } } }
